# legacy-bypass-trailer-allowlist.txt — INFRA-2407
#
# One-time grandfather list for the 141 pre-existing `Bot-Merge-Bypass`
# commits that existed before the Bypass-Trailer-Schema (INFRA-2407) was
# enforced. These commits are allowlisted by SHA so the commit-msg-bypass-
# trailers.sh and pre-push-bypass-trailers.sh validators skip them.
#
# Do NOT add new SHAs here. This list is frozen at schema-enforcement time
# (2026-06-02). All new bypass commits must carry the 4 required trailers.
#
# Seeded by: git log --grep="Bot-Merge-Bypass" --pretty=format:%H
# Seeded at: 2026-06-02 (INFRA-2407 Wave-1)
